SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.kroxylicious.proxy.router

Packages that use io.kroxylicious.proxy.router
Package
Description
io.kroxylicious.proxy.router
The router API.
  • Classes in io.kroxylicious.proxy.router used by io.kroxylicious.proxy.router
    Class
    Description
    CloseOrTerminalStage
    Combined stage of the RouterContext builder API that allows both closing the connection and building the result.
    CloseStage
    Stage of the RouterContext builder API that allows requesting that the client connection be closed.
    Router
    A router decides which route should handle a given incoming Kafka request.
    RouterContext
    Context passed to Router.onRequest(org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiKeys, short, org.apache.kafka.common.message.RequestHeaderData, org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiMessage, io.kroxylicious.proxy.router.RouterContext) for issuing requests to named routes and constructing the routing outcome.
    RouterFactoryContext
    Context for RouterFactory initialisation and router creation, providing access to the plugin registry and router identity.
    RouterResponse
    The outcome of Router.onRequest(org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiKeys, short, org.apache.kafka.common.message.RequestHeaderData, org.apache.kafka.common.protocol.ApiMessage, io.kroxylicious.proxy.router.RouterContext) processing.
    TerminalStage
    Terminal stage of the RouterContext builder API.
